login.title: Sign in to Lolday
login.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again in a moment.

train.title: Train — train a new model
train.description: Train a new model using the train dataset; the result is registered in the Models registry. Optional test dataset enables final metrics + confusion matrix computation.

evaluate.title: Evaluate — score with an existing model
evaluate.description: Run the test dataset through an existing trained model to compute metrics. No new model is registered.

predict.title: Predict — batch inference
predict.description: Run an existing model over an unlabeled dataset, producing predictions.csv. No metrics or ground truth required.

priority.label: Priority
priority.warning: Bumping priority pauses submission of new lower-priority jobs to Volcano until this job is dispatched. Running jobs are not affected.

stagesExplainer.title: About model stages
stagesExplainer.body: Newly registered model versions start in None. Use the Transition button on each version to promote: Staging for candidates under review, Production for the live serving version, Archived for retired versions. Mirrors the MLflow Model Registry lifecycle.

stages.stagingTooltip: Candidate version under validation. Promote here before production.
stages.productionTooltip: Currently the active version. Only one Production version per model at a time.
